title: Trivy scan
description: Runs a Trivy security scan from the workspace root. Defaults to a workspace-wide dependency-vulnerability scan that fails on CRITICAL/HIGH findings.

runner.description: How to run Trivy: the local `trivy` CLI, or the aquasec/trivy Docker image.

dockerImage.description: Docker image used when runner is docker.

cacheDir.description: Host dir to bind-mount as the Trivy DB cache (runner: docker) so CI can persist it via actions/cache. Without it a named volume caches locally.

scanType.description: Trivy scan target subcommand. `fs` scans a filesystem path.

path.description: Path to scan, relative to the workspace root.

failOnFindings.description: Fail the target when findings at/above `severity` exist (--exit-code 1).

ignorefile.description: Trivy --ignorefile; a .trivyignore at the scan root is picked up automatically.

extraArgs.description: Extra raw arguments appended to the trivy invocation.
